creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/12.4R/announce/#_support>: 

> … the FreeBSD 12 release series will be supported until at least 
> January 31, 2023. …

Please, was that a typo? 

It seems not consistent with <https://www.freebsd.org/security/#sup>. 

----

If the date in the announcement will be corrected, then maybe two other changes. 


A) 

> … 12.4 release date, which is yet to be scheduled at the time of 
> this writing.

– change to: 

> … 12.4 release date.


B) 

> Based on the new FreeBSD support model, the FreeBSD 12 release series …

𣀓– change to: 

> The FreeBSD 12 release series …

That's old news; seven years old. We can cease describing the model as new :-)
